content.text: <font size='28'>RobCo Migrator</font>
Convert script-injected leveled-list entries into a clean RobCo Patcher .ini file.
<font size='22'>What this tool actually does</font>

Many Fallout 4 mods inject items into leveled lists at runtime, via Papyrus. Those injections live INSIDE your save file - they bloat it, they don't update when you change load order, and they often persist after you uninstall the mod that created them.

This tool scans your current save, writes out every dynamic injection it finds as a RobCo Patcher .ini file, and then (when you tell it to) wipes the in-save injections so RobCo Patcher takes over. Net result: same items, but they come from disk - not your save.
<font size='22'>Before you click Generate</font>
1.  Make a hard save right now. Not a quicksave. A regular save into a NEW slot.
2.  Make sure RobCo Patcher is installed. (This tool produces files RobCo Patcher reads - it doesn't apply them itself.)
Generate / Update Patch
content.help: Scans the live leveled lists and writes Patch_<your character name>.ini. Safe to run on a save that already has a patch file - existing entries are kept, new ones are added, duplicates are merged into one line, malformed lines are auto-corrected.

content.text: <font color='#888888'>One button does it all. If you've never run this before, click it. If you've already got a patch file and want to update it, click it. The tool figures out the right thing to do.</font>
<font size='22'>After clicking Generate</font>
The success message will tell you the path of the file. Alt-tab out, OPEN that file, and skim it. You don't have to understand every line - just confirm it has roughly the lists you expect.

Then come back here and use the two buttons below in order: first 'I've reviewed the .ini', then 'REVERT ALL LISTS'. The order matters - the revert button is a safety-gated 'wipe live injections' action and the MCM wants confirmation that you actually looked at the file first.
I've reviewed the .ini and I'm ready to revert
content.help: Confirms that you've looked at the generated file. Click this BEFORE the Revert button. The Revert button stays disabled until you do.

content.text: [ REVERT ALL LISTS ]
content.help: Purges the live script-injected entries from every leveled list in your save's RAM. Required step - skipping it means you'd have duplicate injections (the original ones in your save AND the ones RobCo Patcher applies fresh).

content.text: <font size='22'>After reverting</font>
Save into a NEW slot, then EXIT TO DESKTOP. Don't keep playing on this session - the papyrus VM is mid-mutation and continuing is asking for trouble.
Launch the game again, load the new save, and you're done. RobCo Patcher reapplies your patch on every load from now on.
<font size='22'>Per-character files</font>

Patch files are named after your character: Patch_<character name>.ini. If you switch characters and the tool finds patch files belonging to other characters in the folder, you'll get a warning on game load - because RobCo Patcher loads ALL .ini files in that folder, including the wrong characters'.
If you see that warning: alt-tab, go to Data/F4SE/Plugins/RobCo_Patcher/leveledList/RobCoMigrator_Export/, and either delete or move out the files that don't belong to your current character.
